prompt:
Goal: Create a polished vertical visual identity presentation board for a Western food delivery storefront, focused on an Italian pizza and pasta restaurant brand named 番茄街角厨房 with the English subtitle TOMATO CORNER.

Canvas: Tall portrait poster, 2:3 ratio, warm parchment beige background with subtle paper texture, thin red divider lines, rounded cream content cards, premium food-delivery brand proposal style.

Header: At the top left, large dark red Chinese headline text reading 外卖店铺设计案例, with smaller English subtitle “TAKEAWAY STORE DESIGN CASE” and a smaller Chinese line describing Italian restaurant takeaway visual design. Across the top right, show exactly 4 service/category icons with bilingual labels: 1) scooter delivery, “外卖配送 / DELIVERY”; 2) shopping bag pickup, “到店自取 / PICKUP”; 3) pizza icon, “现烤披萨 / PIZZA”; 4) pasta plate icon, “经典意面 / PASTA”.

Hero section: A large rounded rectangular banner occupying the upper third. Use appetizing photorealistic Italian food photography: a margherita pizza in the foreground with melted cheese being lifted in long strands by a fork, cherry tomatoes and basil leaves on top, spaghetti bolognese behind it, warm restaurant lighting, tomatoes and basil leaves as foreground props, green gingham cloth on the left. Overlay a cream label panel on the left with a small circular tomato logo and “ITALIAN KITCHEN”; large red Chinese brand name, green English brand name, a red ribbon tagline reading 现烤披萨，浓郁意面, and handwritten English text “Authentic Italian / Freshly Made”.

Middle promotional strip: Under the hero, create one wide rounded card. On the left, large stacked Chinese promotional copy “现烤现做 / 芝士浓香 / 意式风味”, with a small “Buon Appetito!” script note, decorative tomato icon, and exactly 3 small feature icons labeled “新鲜食材 / FRESH INGREDIENT”, “手工现做 / MADE TO ORDER”, and “热力抢鲜 / HOT & FRESH”. On the right of this strip, place exactly 4 vertical product cards with food photos and bilingual names: 1) Margherita pizza, “玛格丽特披萨 / MARGHERITA PIZZA”; 2) spaghetti bolognese, “肉酱意面 / SPAGHETTI BOLOGNESE”; 3) creamy bacon pasta, “奶油培根意面 / CREAMY BACON PASTA”; 4) cheese baked rice, “芝士焗饭 / CHEESE BAKED RICE”.

Lower layout: Split the lower half into a smartphone mockup on the left and a product grid on the right. The smartphone is a black iPhone-style delivery app screen showing the same restaurant storefront: banner image, brand name, rating 4.8, monthly sales and delivery time details, category tabs, menu list with item thumbnails, red add buttons, prices such as ¥38 and ¥32, and a dark bottom cart bar. Keep the UI realistic and dense but legible.

Product grid: To the right of the phone, create exactly 9 square menu cards in a 3 by 3 grid, each with a food photo, small tomato icon, Chinese name, and English name. The 9 cards must be: 1) “玛格丽特披萨 / MARGHERITA PIZZA”; 2) “肉酱意面 / SPAGHETTI BOLOGNESE”; 3) “奶油培根意面 / CREAMY BACON PASTA”; 4) “海鲜意面 / SEAFOOD PASTA”; 5) “芝士焗饭 / CHEESE BAKED RICE”; 6) “意式番茄汤 / TOMATO SOUP”; 7) “蒜香面包 / GARLIC BREAD”; 8) “提拉米苏 / TIRAMISU”; 9) a brand poster card with Italian street cafe illustration, tomato logo, restaurant name, English subtitle, and red slogan.

Footer: Add a standard color palette bar labeled “STANDARD COLOR / 标准色彩” with a tomato illustration and exactly 4 color swatches: 1) tomato red “#E53935 番茄红”; 2) basil green “#2E7D32 罗勒绿”; 3) cream white “#FFF7E6 奶油白”; 4) cheese yellow “#FFC107 芝士黄”.

Visual style: High-end Chinese design case presentation, clean commercial layout, realistic glossy food photography mixed with small vector icons, warm Italian trattoria mood, tomato-red and basil-green accents, cream card backgrounds, soft shadows, rounded corners, crisp typography, no watermark, no extra sections beyond the specified counts.
